notes: Convert FAQ slot to accordion on website-service

content.value:
Website Service FAQ

How long does a website project usually take?

Timing depends on scope, but we prioritise practical launch speed and measurable conversion improvements.

Can you improve an existing website instead of rebuilding?

Yes. We can optimise structure, copy, CTAs, and performance before recommending full rebuild.

Will the website be set up for leads?

Yes. We align page flow, enquiry actions, and tracking for lead-focused outcomes.
